canonical_rendering_rules: render all content using canonical long syntax
preserve typed references in typed form
do not use heuristic field reordering
short-syntax sources may roundtrip into canonical long syntax
roundtrip_expectations: long syntax -> AST -> canonical long syntax
short syntax -> AST -> canonical long syntax
matching long and short syntax must produce the same semantic AST
section-heavy blocks must preserve child-block structure
stable-core irregularity structures must remain representable without AST rewrites

conformance_levels.name: stable_core
conformance_levels.description: Implements the stable-core syntax, AST, references, short syntax targets, and stable-core block schemas.

conformance_levels.name: full_1_0
conformance_levels.description: Implements the stable core plus advanced normative areas.

fixture_expectations: one minimal valid AST example for every stable-core block type
one minimal valid schema example for every advanced block type
one fixture for each value kind
negative short-syntax fixtures for missing required payload or ambiguity
fixtures for comment and source-span preservation when metadata is supported
